## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss invoicing, upcoming tasks, and Alice's role in the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel walked through setting up recurring invoices and upcoming invoice due dates](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Alice will help with lead follow-up after the upcoming webinar, creating influencer databases, and other sales/prospecting tasks](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [They plan to sync on the sales process after the webinar on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Alice wants to discuss expectations and her role further in a separate meeting](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

## Topics

### Invoicing and Accounts Receivable

  - [Reviewed setting up recurring invoices in the system](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Discussed upcoming invoice due dates for Arena, Sugo, Home Base, Firework](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Marcel explained the process for checking payment status before sending reminders](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Alice's Role and Responsibilities

  - [Alice will help with lead follow-up after the 400+ person webinar on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [She will research/vet leads and provide background on companies](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Alice will create databases like an influencer database, including enriched profile details](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [This will help learn influencer strategies to replicate their content/posting styles](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Other tasks: Following up on prospects like Web Stacks, checking in with Cedira/Jimmy/Molly](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Schedule 1hr sync after Friday's webinar to review sales process](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Alice to send email to Web Stacks following up](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Alice to reach out to Cedira, Jimmy, Molly on other tasks she can assist with](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Separate meeting to discuss Alice's role/expectations in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/UEPRuhMAZCBc3GWNEYHxiVJoD4ixgvDj?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
